row.Description: Hilldun Corporation, established in 1958, specializes in providing financial services such as accounts receivable and factoring to businesses, particularly within the fashion industry. Hilldun is led by CEO Gary Wassner and is known for its customized financial packages and expertise in fashion supply chain finance.
